title: Blade Games
description: This is America’s 8th fastest growning sport. You won’t believe how cool Blade Games are! Blade experts like Kal “The Chopman” Smith and Tank le’Slice compete in chopping, slicing, and even dicing.
altHero: Kal “The Chopman” Smith slicing through a line of plastic water bottles
alt1: a butcher knife slicing through a stuffed lamb
alt2: a knife slicing through a sheet of paper as someone watches closely
alt3: Tank le’Slice, knife in hand, approaching an apple on a pedestal
alt4: Kal “The Chopman” Smith slicing a toilet paper roll as other contestants watch
